queries.q: Break the new bulk-export feature into user stories for next sprint
Write Jira tickets for the password reset flow in persona, action, benefit format
I have an approved PRD for in-app notifications; turn it into stories engineering can pick up
Help me slice this big checkout redesign into small shippable increments the team can estimate
I need to communicate the reporting feature scope to engineering in story form
Draft user stories for the admin role management epic and check them against INVEST
Sprint planning is tomorrow and the search revamp is still one giant blob; help me break it down into ticket-sized pieces
Convert these requirements for the mobile onboarding flow into As a / I want / so that stories
Generate stories from this feature description: customers can save carts and share them with teammates
Our backlog needs the data import capability split into estimable work items with clear user value
Write Given/When/Then acceptance criteria for the cart sharing story
queries.notes: Story already exists; deepening it with GWT criteria is the partner's job

queries.q: Deepen this existing story with testable done conditions QA can pass or fail at handoff
queries.notes: QA-ready done conditions on a single story belong to acceptance criteria

queries.q: The story for CSV import is written; I need QA-ready scenarios covering the happy path and error states
queries.notes: Story-scoped testable scenarios, not story writing

queries.q: Catalog every boundary condition and failure mode across the whole file upload feature
queries.notes: Feature-wide failure catalog belongs to edge cases

queries.q: Write the PRD for our new analytics module before we break anything down
queries.notes: Feature not yet specified; PRD comes before stories

queries.q: Capture the estimates, scope decisions, and open questions from today's backlog refinement session

Write a SQL query joining the orders and customers tables by region
Plan a week-long trip to Portugal in October
